use_cases: Theme switching between light and dark modes in web applications
Primary action triggers in forms and dialogs
Navigation and routing controls within applications
State toggling for UI preferences and settings
Call-to-action buttons in marketing and landing pages
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes, built on Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility. Implements standard accessibility features with focus-visible ring states and disabled state handling. Designed for theme switching and general-purpose UI interactions across web applications.
